issues.description: Target should specify 'up to 1' limit. Current target lacks quantity constraint. Should be {"scope":"ChooseOpponentCharacter","quantity":1,"upTo":true}
Orphaned second effect with trigger:'Trigger' and action PlaySelf is invalid. This card has no self-play clause in official text. Remove this effect entirely.

suggestedDsl.effectText: [On Play] If your Leader has the {East Blue} type, rest up to 1 of your opponent's Characters.
